[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111011000 6
2 0110111110 7
3 0100001100 3
4 1010100100 4
5 0110001100 4
6 0101001001 4
7 1000111011 6

01 10 0110011000 4
12 21 0100001100 3 match 3
23 32 0000000100 1
34 43 0010000100 2
45 54 0100001000 2
56 65 0000001001 2
67 76 1000111011 6 match 7
70 07 1111011000 6 match 1

02 20 0100001000 2
13 31 0010100100 3
24 42 0100001100 3 match 3
35 53 0000000000 a
46 64 0000001000 1
57 75 0101001001 4 match 6
60 06 1000011000 3
71 17 0110111110 7 match 2

03 30 1010000000 2
14 41 0110001100 4 match 5
25 52 0100001000 2
36 63 1000100000 2
47 74 0110001100 4 match 5
50 05 0101001000 3
61 16 0000111010 4
72 27 0100001100 3 match 3

04 40 0110001000 3
15 51 0100001000 2
26 62 0000001000 1
37 73 1010100100 4 match 4
